canonical_answer: At 2 seconds, a red circular logo appears next to the man; at 6 seconds, a lower-third graphic shows the name Trace Dominguez; at 10 seconds, a white arrow icon becomes visible in the top left corner; at 16 seconds, the man raises his open hands while speaking.
